name: sf-consolidate
description: Binary-assertion suite for /ren:consolidate (C3b governed promotion sweep). Validates activation, the no-instincts no-op, the gated-write invariant, and idempotency markers. EXPERIMENTAL — interactive-only.

tests.expected_output_summary: The consolidate skill activates and reads the hot-tier instincts before proposing anything.
binary_assertions: The sf-consolidate skill is activated for this prompt
The skill reads instincts.md (hot tier) before proposing any promotion

tests.expected_output_summary: When there are no unpromoted instincts, the skill reports 'nothing to consolidate' and writes nothing.
binary_assertions: When no unpromoted instincts exist, the user-facing output states there is nothing to consolidate
No file under wiki/ is modified when there is nothing to consolidate

tests.expected_output_summary: Every applied change was shown to the user as a diff and approved before being written (the load-bearing invariant).
binary_assertions: Every wiki change applied by the run was preceded by showing that diff to the user for approval
No autonomous/unattended application occurs — the run is interactive
On any apply failure, the wiki is fully rolled back (no half-applied promotion pair)

tests.expected_output_summary: A promoted instinct's source line gains a `_(promoted …)_` marker so re-running never re-promotes it.
binary_assertions: Each promoted instinct line carries an in-place '_(promoted' marker after the run
A second run does not re-propose an instinct that already carries the promoted marker
